channel.title: SettleWire
channel.description: Prediction markets news: regulation, volume, deals and data.

item.title: Tribal gaming leader warns prediction markets threaten sovereign casino revenues
item.description: James Siva, a tribal gaming advocate, warned in a Tribal Business News Q&A that the rapid expansion of regulated prediction markets poses a direct competitive threat to Native American tribal casino operations.

item.title: Kalshi disputes think tank claims users lose millions to pro traders
item.description: Kalshi is publicly contesting allegations from a think tank asserting that retail users suffer significant losses when trading against professional market makers on the prediction platform.

item.title: Kalshi-Spotify Partnership Collapses in Public Dispute
item.description: Prediction markets platform Kalshi and Spotify ended their promotional partnership in a messy, public falling-out, according to a Garbage Day report published recently.

item.title: Kalshi legitimacy guide targets new prediction market users in 2026
item.description: MLive.com published a consumer explainer in 2026 assessing whether Kalshi is safe and legitimate, aimed at first-time prediction market participants considering the regulated U.S. exchange.

item.title: Corporate Crackdown Targets Prediction Markets Amid Explosive Growth
item.description: Prediction markets are experiencing rapid expansion in 2025, but companies and institutions have begun restricting employee participation, signaling a new wave of corporate resistance to the sector, according to Inc.com.

item.title: Kalshi Expands Perpetual Contracts as World Cup Markets Set Volume Records
item.description: Kalshi has launched an expanded perpetuals product line while World Cup event contracts have driven prediction-market trading volumes to new highs, according to TradingView.

item.title: Midterm Election Contracts Top $200M in Prediction Market Volume
item.description: Traders on prediction markets have collectively wagered nearly $200 million on 2026 U.S. midterm election outcomes, according to NBC News.

item.title: Prediction Markets Expand From Elections to Love Island and Gold
item.description: Prediction markets have broadened sharply beyond political forecasting into entertainment and commodities contracts, including reality TV outcomes and precious metals prices, according to a new PYMNTS.com analysis.

item.title: Italy re-blocks Polymarket, prediction market back on banned list
item.description: Italian regulators have added Polymarket to the country's blocked-site list for a second time, cutting off access to the U.S.-based prediction market platform for users in Italy.

item.title: Polymarket launches $50 deposit-match promos tied to World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: Polymarket is running partner-specific $50 bonus promotions in July 2025, requiring a $20 deposit and unique promo codes, targeting prediction-market activity around 2026 World Cup quarterfinal matches and political events.

item.title: Polymarket launches margin trading, targeting Hyperliquid liquidity
item.description: Polymarket introduced margin trading to its prediction-market platform, a structural upgrade that could draw leveraged liquidity away from decentralized derivatives venue Hyperliquid.

item.title: Kalshi Expands Into Gold and FX Perpetuals Beyond Event Contracts
item.description: Prediction-market exchange Kalshi is moving beyond its core event-contract business by launching perpetual contracts in gold and foreign exchange markets, broadening its product suite.

item.title: Polymarket advances U.S. return with new margin trading framework
item.description: Polymarket is moving closer to a formal U.S. relaunch by developing a margin trading plan, marking the prediction market platform's most concrete step yet toward re-entering the American market.

item.title: Canadians View Prediction Markets as Gambling Despite Sector Growth
item.description: A Yahoo! Finance Canada report finds that most Canadians still categorize prediction markets as gambling, even as platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi expand globally in 2025.

item.title: Kalshi TikTok ads target Love Island viewers in prediction market push
item.description: Kalshi is running a wave of prediction-market betting advertisements on TikTok aimed at Love Island fans, according to Business Insider, marking an aggressive social-media push to recruit younger users.

item.title: Cboe targets prediction market users for options trading conversion
item.description: Cboe Global Markets is actively pursuing prediction market participants as a pipeline for converting retail traders into options customers, the exchange operator revealed in a strategy disclosure reported by Traders Magazine.

item.title: North Carolina law recognizes CFTC federal authority over prediction markets
item.description: North Carolina enacted legislation formally acknowledging the CFTC's preemptive federal regulatory authority over prediction markets, making it one of the first U.S. states to codify that distinction into state law.

item.title: Goldman, Morgan Stanley ban staff from prediction markets, allow sports trading
item.description: Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley have prohibited employees from trading on prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket while permitting sports-betting activity, according to Casino.org.

item.title: Kalshi seeks regulatory approval to expand perpetual event contracts
item.description: Prediction market operator Kalshi is in active discussions with U.S. regulators to extend its never-expiring derivatives products into new market categories, Reuters reported exclusively.

item.title: Polymarket Files for US Margin Trading License on Event Contracts
item.description: Polymarket has submitted regulatory applications to offer margin trading on prediction-market contracts to US users, marking its most direct push yet toward legal domestic operations.

item.title: Wall Street Banks Ban Staff from Trading Prediction Markets
item.description: Major Wall Street banks have issued internal rules prohibiting employees from trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, citing conflicts of interest and compliance concerns, according to Reuters.

item.title: Davis Wright Tremaine: Insider Trading Risk Now Hits Prediction Markets
item.description: Law firm Davis Wright Tremaine published a compliance alert warning that insider trading rules now materially apply to prediction markets, urging platforms and participants to update their programs immediately.

item.title: Goldman, firms grapple with insider trading rules as prediction markets grow
item.description: Goldman Sachs and other major companies are actively developing internal policies to address insider trading risks posed by employee participation in prediction markets, according to CNBC.

item.title: Kalshi market prices 50% chance Fed raises rates in 2026
item.description: Traders on Kalshi's prediction market are pricing approximately 50-50 odds of a Federal Reserve rate hike occurring sometime in 2026, reflecting deep uncertainty as Fed policymakers remain publicly divided on the path forward.

item.title: Kalshi traders bet gas prices stay elevated amid U.S.-Iran tensions
item.description: Kalshi event-contract traders are pricing in persistently higher U.S. gasoline prices through mid-2025, driven by renewed geopolitical risk tied to escalating U.S.-Iran tensions, according to CNBC.

item.title: Arizona Gov. Hobbs Signs Executive Order Targeting Prediction Market Insider Trading
item.description: Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs issued an executive order targeting insider trading on prediction markets, making Arizona the first state to directly regulate information abuse on event-contract platforms.

item.title: Kalshi appeals federal ruling backing New York gambling regulators
item.description: Kalshi has filed an appeal after a federal judge ruled in favor of New York gambling regulators who sought to restrict the prediction-market platform's sports event contracts in the state.

item.title: Kalshi Weather Delay Contracts Draw Regulatory Scrutiny
item.description: Kalshi's new prediction markets allowing bettors to wager on weather-related sports delays have drawn regulatory questions about whether such contracts fall within permissible CFTC-sanctioned event contract boundaries.

item.title: CAP urges ban on government insiders trading prediction markets
item.description: The Center for American Progress published a policy brief calling for prohibitions on government officials trading prediction markets, citing national-security risks from insider-information advantages.

item.title: Prediction Markets Flag 3 Major U.S. Brands as High-Risk
item.description: Prediction market odds are now being used to assess survival prospects for three prominent American brands, according to a new 24/7 Wall St. analysis.
